global.description: The ad features a vibrant and engaging layout promoting a weekend escape offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a weekend getaway with flexible booking options at an affordable price.

elements.label: Abstract shapes background
elements.description: A soft, abstract background featuring a large oval and a square shape in muted tones.

elements.label: Escape this weekend
elements.description: Bold, white text prominently displayed in the center, conveying a sense of urgency and excitement.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: Smaller, white text beneath the headline, providing additional information in a clean, modern font.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A bright, contrasting button with the text 'Install now' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: A clear, prominent price displayed in white, emphasizing affordability and value.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Flexible booking options

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: A simple, recognizable logo positioned at the top, featuring the brand name in a modern font.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, eye-catching badge in the corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, contrasting colors.
